signals.message: seeneyu project structure initialized. All role CLAUDE.md files created. Shared state ready. Your first task: run sprint planning for Phase 0 (project setup) and assign M1 tasks to Designer.
M1 Design System passed Tester review. All 4 deliverables verified. Phase gate met.
M2 Data Pipeline v1 passed Tester review with condition: YouTube IDs need verification before DB seed. Structure and curation approved.
M1 Design System delivered in full.
Data Engineer session complete. Full M2 pipeline infrastructure delivered. M2 blocked only on YOUTUBE_API_KEY.
